allow: PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Projects\\ai-poker; $git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; & $git add .; & $git commit -m "client v2: working two-player game")

PowerShell($resp = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "HTTP status: $\($resp.StatusCode\)"; Write-Host "Content-Type: $\($resp.Headers['Content-Type']\)"; Write-Host "Length: $\($resp.Content.Length\)"; Write-Host "Has telegram-web-app.js: $\($resp.Content -match 'telegram-web-app.js'\)"; Write-Host "Has root div: $\($resp.Content -match 'id=`"root`"'\)"; Write-Host "---"; $bundle = Invoke-WebRequest -Uri "http://localhost:8765/assets/index-DEaFgMbf.js" -UseBasicParsing; Write-Host "Bundle status: $\($bundle.StatusCode\), size: $\($bundle.Content.Length\) bytes")
PowerShell(Set-Location C:\\Projects\\ai-poker; $git = "C:\\Program Files\\Git\\cmd\\git.exe"; & $git add .; & $git commit -m "telegram mini app integration + combined server" 2>&1)
